name: Slack
description: Post messages, read channel history, list members, and search across your Slack workspace using a Bot Token.

auth.hint: Create a Slack App and install it to your workspace to get a Bot Token (xoxb-...).

tools.name: post_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or direct message.

params.name: channel
params.description: Channel ID or name, e.g. #general or C01234567

params.name: thread_ts
params.description: Timestamp of a parent message to reply in a thread

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description: List public channels in the workspace with their name, topic, member count, and ID.

params.name: types
params.description: Channel types: public_channel, private_channel, im, mpim

tools.name: get_channel_history
tools.description: Get recent messages from a channel, including replies count and reactions.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: Get all members of the Slack workspace with their display name, email, and role.
